footer.blurb: KAG is an Egyptian food group producing, distributing, and exporting tomato sauces, jams, juices, and fava beans — built for local communities and global markets.
footer.address: 10th of Ramadan City, Industrial Zone, Sharkia Governorate, Egypt

whoWeAre.heading: Who We Are
whoWeAre.intro: KAG is an Egyptian food group producing, distributing, and exporting trusted food products — from tomato sauces and jams to juices and fava beans. We build for both local communities and global markets, grounded in three values: Quality. Innovation. Growth.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Tomato sauces, jams, juices, fava beans — produced in-house to international food-safety standards.

privateLabel.title: Private Labeling
privateLabel.description: We manufacture under your brand, with consistent quality at the volumes retail demands.

customRecipe.title: Custom Recipe
customRecipe.description: Bring us a flavor profile or a target market — we develop the recipe, sample it, and scale it.

distribution.title: Distribution & Trading
distribution.description: A trade network that moves food goods reliably across Egypt and into regional markets.

export.title: Export
export.description: KAG products on shelves abroad — partnering with importers who value Egyptian origin and consistent supply.

quality.title: Quality & Food Safety
quality.description: Every batch passes through documented quality controls so what leaves our factory matches the spec.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Tomato sauces, jams, and juices crafted to international food-safety standards — every batch, every market.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: New recipes, new packaging, new partnerships — we evolve what KAG puts on the shelf so it stays relevant.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: Built in Egypt for the world: we grow KAG, our private-label partners, and the trade networks that carry our food.

cta.heading: Ready to bring KAG quality to your shelves?
cta.sub: Talk to our team about manufacturing, private-label, custom recipes, or export.

news.heading: Latest News
news.intro: Milestones, certifications, and product launches from across KAG's manufacturing, private-label, and export operations.

whatWeOffer.heading: Four pillars, one promise
whatWeOffer.intro: From our own household brands to private-label production, bespoke recipes, and global export — every pillar is built on KAG's commitment to quality, consistency, and partnership.

ourBrands.title: Our Brands
ourBrands.description: KAG's own household brands — Yamkers and Tasbeka — covering tomato sauces, jams, juices, and fava beans for everyday Egyptian tables.
ourBrands.summary: Two beloved Egyptian brands, one trusted source for everyday pantry staples.
items: Yamkers — sauces, jams, juices & fava beans
Tasbeka — pantry essentials for everyday tables
Distributed across Egypt and exported regionally

privateLabel.title: Private Labeling
privateLabel.description: We produce tailor-made private-label products for international clients — modern manufacturing, premium ingredients, and consistent quality at scale.
privateLabel.summary: Your brand on our lines — premium manufacturing at retail scale.

customRecipe.title: Custom Recipe
customRecipe.description: Bring us a flavor profile, a target market, or a competitor benchmark — our R&D team develops, samples, and scales the recipe that fits.
customRecipe.summary: From concept to shelf-ready product — R&D that delivers.

export.title: Export
export.description: KAG products move reliably across borders — backed by export documentation, logistics partners, and importers who value consistent supply.
export.summary: Egyptian quality, delivered worldwide with reliable supply.

section.heading: Built under your brand
section.intro: End-to-end private-label production for retailers, distributors, and brand owners — recipe to retail shelf, under your label, ready for export.

privateLabel.heading: Your brand, built on our lines
privateLabel.description: From recipe development and ingredient sourcing to modern manufacturing and export-ready packaging, KAG produces tailor-made private-label food products for retailers, distributors, and brand owners around the world — on time, on spec, on shelf.

steps.title: Brief us on your brand
steps.text: Share your target market, flavor profile, and packaging vision — we translate it into a production-ready brief.

steps.title: We develop and sample
steps.text: Our R&D team formulates the recipe, runs sensory and shelf-life tests, and ships samples for your sign-off.

steps.title: Production at scale
steps.text: Automated lines, food-safety controls, and long-term grower partnerships deliver consistent batches under your label.

steps.title: Branded and shipped
steps.text: Custom packaging, export documentation, and logistics partners get your product on shelf — wherever shelf is.

section.heading: Export
section.intro: Egyptian quality, delivered worldwide — KAG products travel reliably across borders, backed by export documentation, logistics partners, and importers who trust consistent supply.

export.description: From Cairo to retail floors across the Gulf, Africa, and beyond — we partner with importers who value Egyptian origin, consistent batches, and on-time delivery at retail volume.

section.heading: Global Reach
section.intro: From our manufacturing base east of Cairo, KAG products travel to retailers, distributors, and food-service partners across four continents — with the documentation, logistics, and consistency that cross-border supply demands.

ourProducts.heading: More than 50 products across our categories
ourProducts.intro: From sauces and jams to juices, fava beans, and beyond — our growing catalog brings Egyptian quality to pantries worldwide. Below are a few of the favourites; the full range is just a click away.

hero.title: Terms & Conditions
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our website and services.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use this site.

sections.title: Use License
sections.body: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on KAG's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not modify or copy the materials, use the materials for any commercial purpose, attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software contained on the website, remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials, or transfer the materials to another person.

sections.title: Disclaimer
sections.body: The materials on KAG's website are provided on an 'as is' basis. KAG makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.

sections.title: Limitations
sections.body: In no event shall KAG or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on KAG's website, even if KAG or a KAG authorized representative has been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.body: If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at our facility: 10th of Ramadan City, Industrial Zone, Sharkia Governorate, Egypt, or via email at wecare@kagegypt.com.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, phone number, company information, and any messages you send us when contacting us or requesting a quotation.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use the information we collect to respond to your inquiries, process quotation requests, send newsletters and updates (with your permission), improve our website and services, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: Information Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except when required by law or to protect our rights and the safety of others.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.body: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: Our website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. You can choose to disable cookies through your browser settings, though this may affect some functionality of the site.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You may also unsubscribe from our communications at any time by contacting us directly or using the unsubscribe link in our emails.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.body: For any privacy-related requests or questions, please contact us at: 10th of Ramadan City, Industrial Zone, Sharkia Governorate, Egypt, or via email at wecare@kagegypt.com.

sections.title: Policy Updates
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
